name: chart-pie-label-custom
visual_summary: Pie chart label component for customizing pie chart labels. Typically used when showcasing detailed data breakdown in a dashboard or chart. Developers can leverage this component for advanced data visualization projects.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-pie-label-custom
Description: Pie chart label component for customizing pie chart labels. Typically used when showcasing detailed data breakdown in a dashboard or chart. Developers can leverage this component for advanced data visualization projects.
Style: material, flat, colorful
Interactions: clickable, hover
Tags: chart, pie-chart, label, customization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
